subject: GCN Circ. 26044 and 26047 are mistakenly submission GRB reports
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov and  E. Gorbovskoy

Due to the incorrect operation of the alert system, our circulars
GCN Circ. 26047 and GCN Circ. 26044 were published by mistake.
Optical transient in a GCN Circ. 26047 are also not real.
We are very sorry about this error.
